question: You told us your father was already married with children when he married your mother, and you named your stepsiblings (Ervan Bahagisavar, Agnan, Eshan, Saber, Bahar, Moahab). But we still don't have your father's first wife's name. What was her name? Were you ever inside her house? How did she treat your mother in the years they lived next door to each other?
